verdict: A mostly standard Easy chart that is severely held back by excessive repetition and uncomfortable, high-difficulty spikes including Up-Down jumps.

issues.problem: The use of JUMP UD (Up/Down) is highly discouraged for Easy charts, as it requires unsafe/awkward body twisting for beginners.
The sequence 'JUMP LR -> tap D -> JUMP LR -> tap D' is copy-pasted excessively, leading to an extremely repetitive and boring gameplay flow.
Transitioning directly from a JUMP UD into dense quarter-note steps (L -> R -> D) ending in another jump at 176 BPM represents a massive, unfair spike in difficulty for an Easy chart.
